strategies.name: Python Baseline
quality: for f in source/labs/*.py; do python "$f" --help >/dev/null || exit 1; done

strategies.name: Precompiled Bytecode
quality: for f in source/labs/*.py; do python "$f" --help >/dev/null || exit 1; done

strategies.name: Optimized Mode (-O)
quality: for f in source/labs/*.py; do python -O "$f" --help >/dev/null || exit 1; done

strategies.name: Aggressive Optimized Mode (-OO)
quality: for f in source/labs/*.py; do python -OO "$f" --help >/dev/null || exit 1; done

strategies.name: No Site Imports (-S)
quality: for f in source/labs/*.py; do python -S "$f" --help >/dev/null || exit 1; done
